summary: Dual-channel onsite debug and support (KVM visual/HID + HASHI remote terminal) for co-located or same-LAN/VPN operator and target devices. Lab sample (APT-HW-0001) and client-facing onsite service; not limited to Personal SKU.
scope_limits: Requires operator control plane and target device on the same LAN (or later same VPN). Not a public-internet always-on rescue control plane.
Applies to any product tier (Personal, vertical role appliance, enterprise single device) when network adjacency holds; do not hard-code Personal-only rescue.
Does not replace PiKVM product Web UI; agents use APIs/helpers as operators would.
Never store or request customer PIN/password material into EXP, logs, or evidence.
Source-of-truth code sync is Git over adjacent network (e.g. hp-test bare). MEGA and OneDrive are non-dependencies for this EXP.
Lab paths (APT-HW-0001, 192.168.0.41, 10.0.0.3) are concrete instances; generalise host/user/paths for other onsite targets.
Candidate EXP: promote toward stable only after repeated live dual-channel runs and founder confirmation.
